We need to respond with JSON only, no markdown. Must follow response contract: {"kind":"think|tool_call|complete","assistant_message":"<brief status>","tool_call":{...},"acquired_fact_ids":[],"readiness_state":"..."}.

We need to decide next action. According to graph frontier recommended expand_file [F1] priority=112 candidates=20 :: Expand file symbols for crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs. So we should make a tool_call to session.expand_file@v1 with target selector. Which selector? Probably "crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs". Use short id? The graph shows [F1] as file node. So target selector likely "F1". Use short id. So payload: {"target_selector":"F1", "depth":?, "limit":?, "relation_filters":?, "priority_threshold":?, "traversal_budgets":?}. We can provide minimal required fields; maybe just target_selector. According to tool contract, session.expand_file@v1 payload includes target_selector and optional depth, limit, relation_filters, priority_threshold, traversal_budgets. We can send just target_selector.

Thus tool_call: {"tool_name":"session.expand_file@v1","payload":{"target_selector":"F1"}}. acquired_fact_ids maybe empty. readiness_state "not_ready" maybe because we haven't got evidence yet. assistant_message brief status like "Expanding file symbols for artifacts.rs". Must be brief.

  "acquired_fact_ids":[],
